tools.name: hivegate_register_guest
tools.description: Register an external agent with a Guest DID on HiveGate. Returns guest_did, access_token, and trust mapping.

tools.name: hivegate_translate_intent
tools.description: Translate a framework-specific intent to Hive-native format. Supports LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI, Anthropic, and A2A.

tools.name: hivegate_execute
tools.description: Execute a cross-ecosystem transaction through HiveGate. Proxies requests to Hive services with bridge fee.

tools.name: hivegate_bridge_trust
tools.description: Map external agent reputation to Hive trust score. Weighted algorithm based on platform reliability and reputation metrics.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "hivegate_register_guest" references sensitive artifacts (access_token). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Register an external agent with a Guest DID on HiveGate. Returns guest_did, access_token, and trust mapping.
